notes: Assertion 'A new strategy class exists' fails for chars-strategy in BOTH configurations — both agents correctly delegated to SampledFrom. This is a false negative; the assertion should be revised.
Assertion 'No regressions' (full test suite) is the key discriminator: all 3 with_skill runs ran dotnet test src/ explicitly; 0 of 3 without_skill runs did.
Both configurations handled PublicAPI.Unshipped.txt correctly (no pre-existing knowledge advantage here — the RS0016 error message is self-explaining).
All 6 runs required exactly 1-2 build fix iterations (IDE style errors: IDE1006 naming, IDE0011 braces). The skill doesn't mention these analyzers — a potential improvement.
without_skill runs were marginally faster (+8.7s less time) and used slightly more tokens (+495) — no meaningful difference.
